agent_mode_dom_hybrid_or_cua_agent_opera: Agent mode: dom, hybrid, or cua (agent operation)
api_key_for_the_selected_provider: API key for the selected provider
describe_what_data_you_want_to_extract_f: Describe what data you want to extract from the webpage...
describe_what_output_format_you_expect_f: Describe what output format you expect from the agent task...
embeddable_browserbase_live_view_url_age: Embeddable Browserbase live view URL (agent operation)
enter_detailed_instructions_for_what_dat: Enter detailed instructions for what data to extract from the page...
enter_the_starting_url_for_the_agent: Enter the starting URL for the agent
enter_the_task_or_goal_for_the_agent: Enter the task or goal for the agent to achieve. Reference variables using %key% syntax.
enter_the_url_of_the_website_to_extract: Enter the URL of the website to extract data from
enter_your_api_key_for_the_selected_prov: Enter your API key for the selected provider
hand_stagehand_a_natural_language_goal_a: Hand Stagehand a natural-language goal and let its agent navigate and act on a site autonomously.
integrate_stagehand_into_the_workflow_ca: Integrate Stagehand into the workflow. Can extract structured data from webpages or run an autonomous agent to perform tasks.
periodically_extract_a_value_from_a_web_: Periodically extract a value from a web page with Stagehand and report when it changes.
use_stagehand_to_extract_structured_fiel: Use Stagehand to extract structured fields from a web page into a typed result.
